perTest.details: Read-only smoke against SANDBOX. list_deposit_profiles(), list_import_profiles(), and get_import_profile(<existing_import_profile_id>) all round-tripped successfully; envelopes unwrapped to the expected List[Dict] / Dict shapes. get_deposit_profile() not exercised (no fixture). 1 passed in 2.06s.

Pure runtime guard exercise. Every bad-input variant of get_deposit_profile() and get_import_profile() (empty / whitespace / None / non-string) raised AlmaValidationError before any HTTP call was issued. 1 passed in 0.06s.

Read-only smoke against SANDBOX. list_letters(), get_letter(<disabled_letter_code>), and list_printers() all round-tripped successfully; envelopes unwrapped to the expected List[Dict] / Dict shapes. get_printer() not exercised (no fixture). 1 passed in 3.47s.

Pure runtime guard exercise. Every bad-input variant of get_letter(), update_letter() (path-parameter and body), and get_printer() raised AlmaValidationError before any HTTP call was issued. 1 passed in 0.06s.

Skipped: Alma letters PUT requires an XML body, but current update_letter sends JSON; the API rejects the JSON payload before applying any change, so the disabled letter was confirmed live to have NEVER been mutated. Tracked as issue #114. cleanupStatus is n/a because the test was skipped before any state-change was attempted. 1 skipped in 0.06s.

Read-only smoke against SANDBOX. get_general_configuration() returned a non-empty Dict[str, Any] of institution settings; get_fee_transactions_report() returned a List[Dict] envelope. No state mutated and no workflow executed. 1 passed in 0.54s.

Pure runtime guard exercise. Every bad-input variant of run_workflow() (empty / whitespace / None / non-string workflow_id) raised AlmaValidationError before any HTTP call was issued. 1 passed in 0.06s.
